title: 6 Inch C-Clamp Set, 2-5/8 Inch Throat Depth Heavy Duty Steel C Clamp Industrial Strength C Clamps for Woodworking, Welding, and Building(2PCs)
features: 【High Quality】High hardness clamp body is anti‑wear and anti‑rust, high strength screw is anti‑slip that can increase the service life.
【Specification】Maximum jaw opening: 6 inches; Throat depth: 2-5/8 inches; Jaw pad width: 1 inch; Thread diameter: 1/2 inch; Thread Length: 6-3/4 inches; Maximum clamping force: 1350 lbs.
【No Damage & Non-Slip】Floating swivel jaw pad, moves freely to adapt to various surfaces, padded clamps that won’t mark surfaces, and prevent the slipping and deviation in the clamping process.
【Widely used】Versatile c clamp secures parts for assembly, fastening, gluing, and welding in woodworking, metalworking, and automotive applications.
Ergonomic T‑shaped energy‑saving handle design to reduce the difficulty of work.
description: Specifications: Material: Cast iron Item Type: C Clamp Diameter: 6" Throat Depth: 2-5/8-Inch Jaw Opening length: 6-Inch Clamping Force: 1350 lbs Package List: 2x C Clamps
